description: MCP servers for architecture, patterns, and engineering context. Default: agent-patterns in .cursor/mcp.json

optional.name: context7
optional.when: Need current docs for a dependency while designing or implementing

optional.name: github
optional.when: Agent needs live GitHub data for the project

agent_patterns_use_cases.mcp_prompt: Recommend a recipe for [goal], expand the patterns it composes, and cite catalog pattern ids.
Which catalog patterns does this design implement, which is it missing, and which anti-patterns is it at risk of?
My agent [symptom]. Use pattern_for_symptom and list fixes and anti-patterns.
Compare [pattern A] vs [pattern B] using related edges and trade-offs from the catalog.
